name: Bananas & Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 large banana or 2 small bananas per person
2 tbsp Calvados, Grand Marnier, or Cointreau
recipeInstructions:
1. Make pancakes using the lager, flour, and egg. Cook in the normal way (using cooking spray to grease a non-stick frying pan).
2. Fold each pancake in half, then fold again so it forms a quarter-circle.
3. Place the pancakes in a large flan dish.
4. Peel bananas, cut into halves, long ways, and then quarters cross-ways, and place face-down on top of the pancakes.
5. In a frying pan or small saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients. Boil for 3-4 minutes until just beginning to be syrupy.
6. Pour over the bananas and pancakes, and bake in a moderate oven (350°F) at mark 4 for 20-30 minutes.
Served with fromage frais and chocolate sauce:
Recipe by: Annabel Smith
